crime.value: Insurance fraud through systematic poisoning of multiple victims
crime.quote: he broke into a crooked run, leap, start, - I have no name for the spasm, - and fell, with a dull weight

victim.value: Young women who were systematically poisoned, including Margaret's sister who wasted away slowly
victim.quote: The sister had wasted away very slowly, and wild and terrible fantasies had come over her toward the end

closed_world.value: Life insurance office investigation with limited suspects known to the victims
closed_world.quote: In my capacity as Chief Manager of a Life Assurance Office, I think I have within the last thirty years

culprit_and_motive.value: The miscreant who poisoned victims for insurance money, confronted by Meltham who promised to haunt him
culprit_and_motive.quote: You shall see me once again in the spirit, when the cord is round your neck, and the crowd are crying

resolution.value: The criminal dies by his own poison after being confronted, ending his crimes through poetic justice
resolution.quote: the room was filled with a new and powerful odour, and, almost at the same instant, he broke into a crooked

investigator.value: Mr. Sampson, Chief Manager of a Life Assurance Office, narrating his experiences with insurance fraud
investigator.quote: In my capacity as Chief Manager of a Life Assurance Office, I think I have within the last thirty years

suspect_architecture.value: Single primary suspect (Slinkton) with elaborate false identity, plus secondary figures including accomplice Beckwith and victims Margaret/Alice
suspect_architecture.quote: When we saw that he was dead, we drew away from the room, and Meltham, giving me his hand, said

red_herring.value: Slinkton's caring devotion persona - praised by Margaret for his 'care of her dead sister' and 'untiring devotion'
red_herring.quote: she praised him to me, for his care of her dead sister, and for his untiring devotion in her last illness

clue_fairness.value: Physiognomy principle established early - narrator's skill at reading faces presented as investigative method available to reader
clue_fairness.quote: There is nothing truer than physiognomy, taken in connection with manner

social_world.value: Life insurance industry hierarchy with Chief Manager narrator having institutional authority and access to financial records/patterns
social_world.quote: In my capacity as Chief Manager of a Life Assurance Office, I think I have within the last thirty years seen more

reveal_mechanic.value: Poison suicide - perpetrator takes his own poison when confronted, demonstrated through 'new and powerful odour' and immediate death
reveal_mechanic.quote: the room was filled with a new and powerful odour, and, almost at the same instant, he broke into a crooked run

media_and_audience.value: Insurance industry insider perspective frames crimes as 'romances' - professional distance transforms sordid murders into narrative
media_and_audience.quote: Most of us see some romances in life. In my capacity as Chief Manager of a Life Assurance Office

investigator_wound.value: Meltham's guilt over failing to save his beloved - 'he might have saved her, he said; he had not saved her' leads to his death
investigator_wound.quote: He might have saved her, he said; he had not saved her, and he reproached himself; he had lost her
